title: All the utils!
description: All The Utils is a lightweight Vanilla+ modpack focused on performance, visuals, and quality of life. Enjoy smoother gameplay, better UI, shader support, voice chat, and rich world details — all while keeping the classic Minecraft feel.
body:
All The Utils is a smooth, performance-boosted, quality-of-life–packed modpack designed for players who love vanilla Minecraft — just better.
Every mod in this pack enhances the experience without breaking the game’s core feel. From better visuals and smoother performance to small gameplay conveniences and immersive sound, All The Utils gives you everything you need to make Minecraft more polished and efficient.

⚡ Performance & Optimization

Sodium, Lithium, FerriteCore, ImmediatelyFast, More Culling, and Entity Culling keep your framerate high and stutters low.

Dynamic FPS saves resources while the game is in the background.

Noisium helps with smoother terrain generation.

🎨 Visual Enhancements

Iris Shaders for shader support.

Visuality, AmbientSounds, and LambDynamicLights make your world come alive.

Default Dark Mode & Unique Dark provide sleek UI options.

3D Skin Layers adds more character detail.

🧭 Utility & Information

Jade, AppleSkin, Item Borders, Shulker Box Tooltip, Item Highlighter, and BetterF3 make information easily accessible.

Advancement Plaques makes achievements satisfying.

Waystones and Xaero’s Maps (Minimap & World Map) help you navigate your world with ease.

Reese’s Sodium Options adds a clean UI for performance tweaks.

🗣️ Communication & Social

Simple Voice Chat for in-game talking.

Chat Heads for clear player identity.

No Chat Reports for privacy and server freedom.

Essential Mod for social features and multiplayer invites.

⚙️ Utilities & Frameworks

Fabric API, Cloth Config, YetAnotherConfigLib (YACL), Balm, Iceberg, and CreativeCore power mod compatibility.

Fabric Language Kotlin ensures modern mod functionality.

Text Placeholder API enables cleaner mod communication.

🌍 Extra Features

Distant Horizons adds LOD rendering for breathtaking long-distance views.

Mouse Tweaks improves inventory management.

Clumps collects XP orbs for easier pickup.

Prism gives improved rendering stability.

💡 In Short

All The Utils is a Vanilla++ experience focused on:
✅ Performance
✅ Visual polish
✅ QoL tools
✅ Multiplayer friendliness

Perfect for players who want Minecraft at its smoothest, smartest, and most beautiful, without changing the core gameplay.
